title: World sets welcome health record: trachoma cases fall below 100 million for first time
description: The number of people at risk has fallen 94% since 2002, with Burundi, Egypt, Fiji, Mauritania, Papua New Guinea and Senegal all defeating trachoma in 2025
author: Gavin Haines
body: The world has reached a landmark public health milestone as trachoma cases have fallen below 100 million for the first time in recorded history.

title: Scientists achieve record-breaking solar panel efficiency in lab test
description: A new photovoltaic cell has achieved 47% efficiency, smashing previous records and raising hopes for cheaper clean energy
author: Damian Carrington
body: Researchers have achieved a new world record for solar panel efficiency, converting 47% of sunlight into electricity in controlled laboratory conditions.

title: Rewilding project brings back lynx to Scottish Highlands after 1,000 years
description: Conservation charity successfully reintroduces the Eurasian lynx, sparking new hopes for biodiversity recovery across Britain
author: Positive News
body:
For the first time in over a millennium, the haunting cry of the lynx may once again echo through the Scottish Highlands.

A conservation charity has successfully reintroduced six Eurasian lynx into a carefully selected area of the Cairngorms National Park.
